reviews.title: Very Nice

Very nice. Looks good, I like the gold edging more than I thought I would. A little small, but I barely notice. The mouse I WAS using was HUGE, and my entire palm rested on it. This one only covers ⅔ of my palm.

Very comfortable.

Have not played anything that could be considered a stress test. I like that you can turn it off, but I dislike that you have to remember to turn it off.

I cannot tell if it goes to sleep.

reviews.title: wireless mouse

I ended up choosing to use this one.  It loaded quickly and is very comfortable to use.  Very, very quiet click - almost silent.  Having said all of this, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

reviews.title: It works great! But not for long!
reviews.text:
Came a day early, put two AAA batteries in, put the USB in the laptop, and away we go.

It works great.

Update: It didn't work for long. It starts out with the mouse going to sleep all on it's own, and then it gets worst (you wouldn't think it possible, would you). I left the laptop and mouse on while I ran to the store, when I came back it was working VERY intermittent (very jerky) so I opened it thinking maybe my batteries weren't all that good.

What did I find? One of the batteries was so hot I couldn't touch it. I'm surprised it didn't catch on fire.

I should have known better than to buy some Chinese garbage. Into the trash it went.

Don't buy this, it's a waste of good money.

reviews.title: Amazing l! Always get what I order with fast shipping and selections to choose from!!
reviews.text: I’m always satisfied with anything I have ordered from Amazon and they nailed it with this order. Since I was drooping sizes I wasn’t sure!!  Super fast shipping!!! I had placed a big order, 3 days after placing order, I was opening my packages, and that’s counting the evening I placed my order!  I received  all my order at same time,I had to order several clothing items due to a major  weight loss because of illness!!!! Everything I have is too big for me now so I had nothing to wear and when I say nothing, I mean NOTHING!!! I had to order smaller sized clothes  so I’d have some clothes to wear!! I’m talking about losing 28lbs, which doctors say I’m  probably not gonna gain back, maybe  5-10lbs if I’m lucky!!!  All I been wearing is my pj’s and yes had to order some pj’s!!!!! I’m normally a small, sizes 5,6,7, weight 120-125, small frame,and am 5’3” tall. So I can’t afford to lose weight esp. 28lbs which was all lost over a 4 wk period of time, I have trouble keeping weight on me anyway!! And I can’t gorge myself with the foods that will make me gain weight cause I’m a diabetic!! So I’m in a no-win situation!!!! Thank you Amazon for giving me some cloths to wear. I ordered sizes 2-5 in slacks or jeans, small or 5-6 pj’s, small or med tops, small or 5-6 lounge clothing, so I’d say they are true to size at least for me they are. So hope that helps with ur sizing if u not sure!! Cause all the clothing was in that size range and I have 2  items that is to big out of all the clothing I ordered. Grouped all clothing in this review on size instead of  each individual piece of clothing!!! So go with ur size u are changing to and Amazon measurements to make sure and by looking at my before and after size, weight that should get u right on size u need to order.

reviews.title: Great battery life
reviews.text: I'm still not fully decided about how I feel about this mouse. But, I can talk about what I know so far. The packaging I got the mouse and was really nice, really simple, but easy to open. The mouse was easy to set up, and the RGB looks pretty cool. There is a really cool DPI changer function that makes gaming much easier, however, I can't recommend this mouse for gaming because the ergonomics are pretty trash. I have to cramp my hand like a claw over the top of the mouse and after long periods of use it does start hurting. The surface is also pretty slippery, so I found that my hand slips on the mouse all the time. The tracking however, is great! And I would have to say that biggest plus is the battery life. I got this about 2 weeks ago, charged it once, and it is yet to die! I think the features of this mouse are great, but I would not recommend it. Purely because of the ergonomics, if you are going to use this mouse often, then you probably should go if something more ergonomic.

reviews.title: Basic but functions well
reviews.text: I ordered a ‘LED Wireless Mouse, Uiosmuph G12 Slim Rechargeable Wireless Silent Mouse, 2.4G Portable USB Optical Wireless Computer Mice with USB Receiver and Type C Adapter (Silver)’ for review.  For the price point, this is a basic mouse.  The rotating light strip is a cool looking feature.  It is sleek in design.  It connected well with the dongle to my Surface Pro.  It glides well over a mouse pad.  It is rechargeable, which I prefer to battery operated.  The click of this mouse is quiet. The dongle slides into the bottom and of course it has already been lost.  I prefer the dongle to be stored in a closed compartment on a mouse.  It does not require recharging for several days of moderate use and seems to charge quickly.  Overall, for basic use, this mouse works well.

reviews.title: Liked it until .....
reviews.text:
As I began typing, I liked the smooth, quite feel BUT quickly discovered that this keyboard does NOT have a 'Print Screen' key, which is vital when working. DO NOT Buy this if you need it for work. As you can see in the picture provided, the 'F11' key is NOT labeled.
F11 toggles from Full Screen back to regular screen. The first 4 keys at the top of the number key pad are TOTALLY UNNECESSARY.
1st key) Same function as Ctrl+C (Copy)
2nd key) Does Absolutely Nothing!
3rd key) Same function as Ctrl+V, (Paste)
4th key) Same function as Ctrl+X (Cut)
Had this keyboard followed the SAME FORMAT
The keyboard is overpriced to be missing a vital function as Print Screen Key.

reviews.title: It's a mouse, it works.
reviews.text:
When purchasing a bluetooth mouse, or any bluetooth device, an important factor is how well it connects and how well it STAYS connected. After all this time, the industry still can’t make up its mind about how bluetooth works:
- Microsoft with their mouse and Sony with their controller that pair without the need of a code (which Android’s bluetooth stack doesn’t support).
- Mice and keyboards that will not reconnect after it wakes from sleep mode.
- To this day, bluetooth devices still can’t wake a computer from suspend state.
So when I get a simple bluetooth mouse for a good price, and it actually works as expected, I was happy.

For my review, I’m comparing the Bornd mouse to the [[ASIN:B006428K7I Motorola 89519N Bluetooth Mouse]] which I got in a set that included the [[ASIN:B004L9MBH6 Motorola Wireless Keyboard for Motorola ATRIX and XOOM (Motorola Retail Packaging)]].

With the Motorola mouse, its frequency somehow conflicts with the Motorola keyboard, resulting in sticky keys, as in “I’m having a good daaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaay”. Conversely, the keyboard interferes with the mouse where the computer would actually lose connection with the mouse for a few seconds after typing, or lose connection completely.

What I liked about the Bornd:
- Pairing was simple using the button at the bottom of the mouse.
- Operating distance is about 5 feet, but this may be because of my computer’s bluetooth antenna
- Takes a single AA battery which lasts over a month of moderate use (2 hours per day)
- Mouse movement is good. No need to adjust mouse speed in the control panel.
- Accuracy is good. Editing images using Pixlr.com, I’m able to select precisely the parts of the image I need.

What gave me trouble with the Bornd:
- When you first put your hand on this mouse, you will not feel that it is very well built. The plastic is completely smooth and the mouse wheel seems to rattle when you shake it. I got used to it after a few minutes, though.
- The mouse reconnects with the computer most of the time, but sometimes it was necessary to turn the mouse off and on again after the computer reboots or if the computer was out of range for an extended period of time.
- Lately, I’ve been experiencing double-clicks when I click on the left mouse button once. I’m usually able to fix this by getting angry and slamming the mouse down a couple of times. This may indicate a build quality issue with this mouse.

In my specific case, the Bournd did not interfere with my Motorola keyboard at all and it seems the sticky key occurs only when the batteries on the keyboard runs low.

reviews.title: I really do "love it".
reviews.text: I am using this device with an Asus Transformer Book T100TA touch screen notebook I recently purchased.  The device was recognized and connected to the notebook with no unusual delays or difficulties.  it works well with the PC as I recline in my easy-chair, using small motions upon the arm of the chair and allowing me to navigate through email and web browsing and to play games.  It is a nice compliment to the available on-screen gesture controls of the computer, especially for a die-hard convert from Windows XP and Windows 7 operating systems.

Better energy efficiency and environmental protection. It will enter sleep mode after 1.5 minutes of inactivity for power saving, and wake it up by clicking any button or moving the mouse.

🎉SILENT CLICK & HIGH RESPONSIVENESS - This noiseless mouse reduces the noise by up to 90%, no need to worry about the click sound disturbing others. 3 Adjustable DPI Settings(800, 1200, and 1600)are very precise with every sensitive movement.

🎉COMFORTABLE & DURABLE DESIGN - Ergonomic design with an elegant profile. It has 6 buttons including 2 buttons for forward and backward on the left side ideal for both work and gaming. Tested over 5 million times click lifespan ensure long-term stable use.

🎉WIDE COMPATIBILITY - The BT 5.1 is compatible with windows 8/10(but not windows 7 or XP), Android, and Mac OS systems; the 2.4G USB connected mode supports any USB-enabled device, which just needs to insert the USB receiver. It Fits desktops, laptops, PC, Macbooks, Chromebook, and Surface pro.

reviews.title: False advertisement
reviews.text:
See attached image. This is what you get. Colors of the actual item and the color of the advertised item. Not even close. Mouse itself is "ok" at best. DPI button makes noise like it is a mouse straight from 1990s. Item returned.

Update: Seller reached out to me and sent out a replacement, white and blue version. Mouse received and the colors are true to the image. DPI button needs improvement and the seller has promised to continue working on that feature. Otherwise can only say that it was a proper and appreciated gesture from the seller. Score updated to 4/5 for customer service.

reviews.title: Perfect Mouse for size and function!
reviews.text:

Battery life is great as well and it also works while charging. Price is so good I bought a couple of them for my home office and work office as well as gifts for co-workers. Looks great on desk as well.

Cons - None really but the feet on the bottom have tiny invisible plastic packaging wrap on them that has to be peeled off or it becomes old and sticky making mouse hard to move. Took me a hot minute to figure this out.

reviews.title: RAPIQUE Bluetooth Wireless Mouse
reviews.text:
RAPIQUE Bluetooth Wireless Mouse
Great mouse. USB C re-chargeable. Can run in bluetooth or RF mode. Lights up so can see when lights are off. Feels great. Compact but not to compact, is still comfortable and ergonomical.
Affordable.
I used to buy the well known name brand mouse that can cost 2 to 4 times the price. With the competitor mouse after about 6 to 12 months it would start to double click. I now feel maybe that is "planned obsolence", so I will no longer buy that mouse.
The main shortcuts I use are forward and back which are already on two side buttons. I then also use Start + D for Desktop, so I can do that with this mouse.
Liked it so much bought 2 more for my other laptops / backups.
Great mouse.

reviews.title: Best looking mouse for a macpro .
reviews.text: I connected the mouse via BT on my MacBook pro. Lasts me all day will purchase it again if mine stopped working. So far so good.

reviews.title: Excellent Keyboard!
reviews.text: This was a Christmas gift for my daughter and she absolutely loves everything about this keyboard. Thank you

reviews.title: Keyboard is very loud when typing!
reviews.text: The mouse is pretty standard, nothing great, but nothing bad. I brought my cute little set to work in my laptop bag so I figured it was secure. When I took the keyboard out 1 letter had popped off. No biggie, it snapped back on easily. The keyboard buttons are bit higher than I'm used to so I was typing slower and it was a bit uncomfortable after a while. I planned on switching back to my regular keyboard shortly but what escalated that switch was how loud the keyboard was while I was typing. My office is usually rather quiet plus I'm in a cubicle and a coworker asked what are you doing over there!?! He said it sounded like I was hammering the letters with a small hammer. I knew it was loud but after realizing it was bothering my coworkers I immediately put it in my bag to bring home. Haven't used it since!

reviews.title: Nice keyboard and mouse set
reviews.text: This is a great mouse and keyboard set, feels like typing on an old typewriter but more comfortable. I like the combined usb. Looks very nice, comfortable to use,

reviews.title: Amusing
reviews.text: I really like this set. They both match perfectly. The keyboard is comfortable and all the buttons work perfectly. I like the round buttons they are pretty cool. Connects easy enough. Just wish it was rechargeable.

reviews.title: Plug and Play Wireless Keyboard; Not sure about the mouse
reviews.text: I run Windows 10 on my laptop, and this wireless keyboard was up and running in few minutes after unpackaging.  You will need to provide your own batteries (2 AA – one for the mouse and one for the keyboard).  The keys are not tactile like other “typewriter” keyboard I have, but the keys have enough tension in the loaded spring to give a slight “satisfactory” feel to the keystrokes.  The wireless connection between the receiver and the keyboard/mouse was responsive and experienced no noticeable delay.  I am not 100% sold on the “milk tea” colored keyboard, but it slowly grew on me after a few days of use, although my 8-year young daughter thought it was like a puke color… an interesting observation.  The mouse was not for me.  It was too flat and too small for my hand, and after a few hours of cumbersome use, I switched back to my existing mouse pad.  For less than $49 USD, I think this keyboard brings a fun look to the otherwise a boring office environment.

reviews.title: Cute item but it doesn't stay connected.
reviews.text:
Super cute item! It took me a while to get use to the small click space and it tracks well but the main issues is the USB isn't reliable. Anytime I put the laptop to sleep or I don't use the mouse for a while I have to unplug the USB and turn the mouse on/off. It is really inconvenient but my return wind has closed to exchange it.

Looks are a 10 and functionality is a 2 because it does not work as intended.

reviews.title: low quality
reviews.text: I received a replacement for the first one that would shut off and on constantly. The 2nd one worked for about a week and then stopped. When trying to remove the USB connector from my laptop it cam apart. Part of it got stuck in the USB port. It took over 5 minutes to pull the rest of it out with tweezers! I returned it for a refund. This is a low quality piece of junk. Do not buy.

reviews.title: Cheap- don’t buy it!
reviews.text: This mouse works some of the time... very cute but unreliable. For the return process, I had to pack and ship on my own. It cost half the price of the mouse to return.

reviews.title: Cutest thing ever
reviews.text: So adorable! It moves super smoothly and I love the color. It is wider than most mice I'd say, but not by much. It still feels natural and easy to use. The buttons are easy to use as well. My only concern is that when I have to wake my computer up from sleep mood, I really have to shake it. But that may be my sensitivity settings, but they were just fine with my previous mouse. Either way, this is super cute and I love it!

reviews.title: DESTROYS PORTS! DO NOT BUY!
reviews.text: The first one died after 2 hours. It damaged the port on one side of my laptop. The replacement did the same thing to the other side. I now have no functioning ports - can’t use another mouse or flash drives. This company owes me a new laptop!!!!

EXCLUSIVE HORN-LOADED TECHNOLOGY Klipsch Micro Tractrix horns make a major contribution to the Promedia 2.1's amazing proficiency.  Their highly efficient design reproduces more sound from every watt of power, controlling the dispersion of that sound and sending it straight to your ears for clarity and lifelike impact no other system can duplicate. CLEAN BASS OUTPUT AT ALL VOLUME LEVELS The two-way satellites' 3" midbass drivers blend perfectly with the Promedia 2.1's  solid, 6.5" side-firing, ported subwoofer for full bandwidth bass response you can actually feel.  With a separate subwoofer volume control, you can adjust for the best bass for what you're listening to. PERFORMANCE THAT CREATES FLEXIBILITY With its plug and play setup and convenient 3.5mm input, the Promedia 2.1 can double from anything from a TV sound enhancer to a 2.1 Home Theater system.  Its 200 watts of dynamic system power can fill even a larger room with sound.  The headphone jack allows for private listening when desired. reviews.title: These are great sounding computer speakers
reviews.text:
I have the Klipsch Pro Media Thx 2.1. These are great sounding computer speakers. They best the Bose Companion II which sound terrible in comparison. the Bose sound shallow and weak. These speakers have 3 1/2 inch long throw woofers for the midrange, and a real subwoofer for the lows. They are great sounding for what they are and the best computer speakers to my knowledge in the $200 or below genre.

However, they need to be tweaked. The subwoofer is slightly heavy (although an adjustment is on your speakers) and the highs are slightly bright like other Klipsch speakers, and the midrange is slightly recessed. Simply set your computer system from Windows at 70% output roughly, then pull up iTunes (if you use it) or another equalizer, and set the low bass from about 65K down about 3db below average, put the midrange from about 125K on up to about three 3DB higher than normal, then set the 1K at zero, and above that from 2K on up about 3db below zero. You can adjust that a little to make a curve

These speakers are great. I went with refurbished myself at a little over half price. Enjoy! They are great.

P.S. I am an audiophile who has a good ear and an extremely good stereo system. These do not equal that, but sound great for what they are and better than all others for $200 or less and close to the $400 plus systems.

reviews.title: Not natural sounding but that's how I like my computer speakers to sound
reviews.text: I'm not clear what the differences are between this model and the other identically labelled model from other sellers that sell for less money. You shouldn't pay more than $120-$135 for these from what I can tell after shopping around. I bought mine in "like-new" condition for $99 with Prime free shipping and I'm ecstatic about the sound quality. Subwoofer is boomy and the sat speakers are bright. Typical Klipsch sound. Not natural sounding but that's how I like my computer speakers to sound. I compared these to the Logitech at $105-$120. I own a pair of those too. I'm a fan of Logitech. Make that, I used to be a fan. Going to go with Klipsch if I ever have need for more speakers. These sound great. You won't be disappointed if you like the "Klipsch sound."

reviews.title: The satellite speakers are clear with a good amount of range and depth whether playing games or ...
reviews.text: First experience with Klipsch speakers and I am thoroughly impressed! Wasn't expecting the amount of impact from the subwoofer (my previous pc came with a factory 5.1 setup and fall flat compared to these). The satellite speakers are clear with a good amount of range and depth whether playing games or listening to music/watching videos. I was worried that a 2.1 setup would leave something to be desired vs a 5.1 setup, but I'm glad I made the jump!

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.text: Perfect just as described

reviews.title: No better computer speaker out there
reviews.text:
There is simply no better set of computer speakers out there. The subwoofer rivals those home theater setups as well. I have this in my office connected to a Mac Mini which I often use for iTunes and watching movies, and recording to Garageband.

I have never cranked the volume 100%, it's incredibly loud at 65%. Bass is very smooth and powerful.

I actually needed speakers for an outdoor wedding and actually brought these to the event, no one complained about not being able to hear the ceremony even 20 rows back.

If you can't afford a home theatre system, consider this 2.1 for your living room as well. This will surprise you.

title: Neises Ergonomic Mouse, Bluetooth Mouse for ipad,Bluetooth Mouse for MacBook Air/Mac/MacBook Pro/Mini/ipad Pro/iMac/Laptop,Rechargeable Wireless Mouse for MacBook Air/MacBook pro Chromebook Laptop PC
description:
Tip:Scientific ergonomic design maintains healthy wrist and arm positions to achieve smoother movement and reduce overall stress.
How to use it:
A. 2.4Ghz Mode:
Switch to "ON/OFF" button to right.And Plug the receiver into the USB port or use a USB C adapter to plug into the type c port of your computer, Then you can use the mouse in 2.4GHz Mode.
B. Bluetooth Mode:
Switch on Bluetooth on your device and power on the mouse. Press the DPI Button or Press Left,Roller and Right 3 Buttons together for 5 seconds.When the mouse name coming up on the device.Click it and it will be connected.
Note:
System Requirement: Windows 8/10, Android 4.2 and above,Mac & IOS 10.10(Compatiable with 4.2BLE、4.1BLE、4.0BLE or earlier)
Package Included:
1* Dual Mode Mouse
1* Charging Cable
1*USB Receiver (under earth the mouse)
1*Type C Adapter
Note:
1. It's out of power if the mouse cursor moves slowly or stop moving. Please recharge it. Note: Please do not charge the mouse with mobile phone charger.
2. Please charge the mouse for 2 hours before the first time to use it. The blue light beside the scroll wheel will be on while charging, and then goes off when the mouse is fully charged.
3. Not all computers support two modes. For example, Win 7 system does not support Bluetooth mode.
4. There is memory function on Bluetooth Type Mouse.When the mouse has connected another device,and now you would like connect the device not connected with the mouse last time, it should re-connect with the device.
5. If choosing Bluetooth connecting way, don’t insert USB receiver to the device you would to connect.Otherwise,it will choose 2.4G connecting way automatically.
features: 【2022 Latest Upgrade Optical Ergonomic Design】Reduce the overall pressure on the hand, specially designed for long-term use of the mouse, providing a more comfortable way to use.

【DUAL MODE BLUETOOTH MOUSE(BT 5.1 + 2.4GHz)】Dual mode wireless mouse one mouse can switch freely between two devices. Note: If choosing Bluetooth connecting way, don’t insert USB receiver to the device you would to connect.Otherwise,it will choose 2.4G connecting way automatically.

【BUILT-IN BATTERY AND AUTO ENERGY-SAVING】The mouse built-in rechargeable battery, with a charging cable. No need to change batteries. To saving power, the mouse will fall asleep after 10 minutes no-operation, it can be waken up by clicking any button.

【3 ADJUSTABLE DPI LEVELS AND SILENT CLICK】 Among 1000, 1200 and 1600 to meet different needs. Special soundless design for the right and left buttons, make you concentrate on working or playing games without disturbing others.
【MULTI-FUNCTION BUTTON】Forward and backward button to provide convenience for browsing pages and games.

reviews.title: Liked it but doesn’t last long
reviews.text: The reviews seemed to be a mix so I figured I’d give the mouse a shot with my MacBook. Worked great until one week after the return window closed and now it’s worthless junk. I would skip this.

reviews.title: Wheel Started Squeaking Less than 2 Weeks into Usage
reviews.text: I love the design of this mouse but the scrolling wheel started squeaking when used less than 14 days into using this mouse and it's, quite honestly, a bit maddening.  I can't figure out WHY it's squeaking and I've tried using compressed air to maybe clean something that might have gotten into the mouse to no avail.  It still squeaks.  All. The. Time.

reviews.title: Works perfectly with my iPad
reviews.text:
I bought this so I could mirror my iPad to my 27" iMac and play some gorgeous games on a big screen. The mouse lets me use the iPad as an, um, mousepad...works beautifully. The instructions were easy to follow and the box contains a wireless receiver if you don't want to use bluetooth. Also in the box is a USB adapter if you need to plug the receiver into a USB-C port.

And finally, the color-changing light bar is kinda sexy. A bargain at the price.

reviews.title: Great mouse

The factory feet on my mouse were leaving dark spots on my light colored desk at work.
These fit great and have noticeably lower friction than the worn factory pads. The adhesive is strong but repositionable if you don't get it right first time.

I wish you could manually turn it on or off. But other than that it's good quality and I haven't had an issue.

reviews.text: Love the color!!! Works perfect! Thanks!

reviews.title: cheap mouse that gets the job done
reviews.text: This is a cheap mouse that gets the job done. There's no on and off button, so do know it's going to drain the battery no matter you use it or not as long as there's a battery in it. I consider myself having a pretty big hand for a woman (around 12in from thumb to my pinky when stretched), I still feel this mouse is a tad big for me that it wasn't intuitive when grabbing onto it. I also didn't like the edges/ dents for your thumb and ring finger. I now know a slimmer mouse without edges works better for me and I can't recommend this mouse unless you are looking for something less than ten.

title: Silent Wireless Mouse, 2.4G Slim Travel Mouse with USB Receiver, Quiet Click Protable Computer Mice for Laptop PC Mac, Comfortable Texture, Black & Silver
description: Silent Wireless Mouse, 2.4G Slim Travel Mouse with USB Receiver, Quiet Click Protable Computer Mice for Laptop PC Mac, Comfortable Texture, Black & Silver
features: No Annoying Clicky Sounds & Portable: This mouse is super quiet, no more disturbing for others. The slim design of this mouse is great to store in a backpack. It's not bulky at all.

Responsive 2.4 GHz Wireless Technology & Easy Set Up: 2.4 GHz provides stronger anti-interference ability, a faster transmission speed, working distances can up to 15m. Very easy to get connected and smooth to use (just insert in USB drive)

Low Power Consumption: Energy saving feature makes longer battery life (battery not included), It will enter auto sleep mode if you don't use it for 5 minutes, can be easily activated by clicking any buttons.
Soft Touch & Sleek Appearance: Smooth frosted surface for soft to the touch. Great color options and sleek design make it the best choice for home, office or travelling use.
Wide Compatibility: Work perfectly Windows7/8/10/XP, Vista, Mac OS X 10.4 etc. Fits for desktop, laptop, PC, Macbook and other devices.

title: Ergonomic Wireless Mouse with USB Receiver for PC Computer, Laptop and Desktop, Ergo Mouse with Silent Clicks, About 16-Month Battery Life, Up to 1600 DPI & 1 AA Battery Powered, BluePurple
features: Ergonomic Design: The ergonomically vertical handshake position reduces muscular strain and the pressure on your wrist, while your thumb is positioned comfortably on the thumb rest.
Plug and Play: Reliable wireless connection using a plug-and-play USB dongle, wide working range of a radius up to 32 feet, no additional driver needed.

Comfort Shape for Medium or Large Grip: (Dimensions:11.8cm/4.6in*7.5cm/3in*5.8cm/2.2in)The ergo mouse can help you work better and faster with a perfectly-crafted full-size shape designed for the large palm (even over 7.5- inch palm).

Ultra-Quiet Clicks & Well-Placed Thumb Controls: No more annoying click noise to create better, quieter environment for you and those around you. Create and work more intuitively and effortlessly with the ideally placed front and back buttons.

Premium Long-Lasting Battery Life: Only one AA battery needed, it can work up to 16 months thanks to auto-sleep power saving mode and on/off switch button. Note: The battery life may vary based on use and computing conditions.

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.text: I was looking for something a bit angled because my wrist was feeling uncomfortable but I didn't want an extreme twist to the side. I've always used Logitech mice but this has been working great. I wish it had a couple more buttons on it so I could set a button to heal and one to my 4th skill but otherwise it's just what I needed. It goes to sleep when you don't use it and wakes up when you click so I don't have to turn it off. And it's blurple, the best color.

reviews.title: Perfect fit
reviews.text: I have a small hand and it fit great. Works amazing.

reviews.title: Love it - very comfortable
reviews.text: Bought to replace the mouse I lost on vacation. Best purchase. I like the pink as my boys will not steal it.

reviews.title: Stopped working after 2 days
reviews.text: Don’t waste your time or money on this remote. It feels great & is a cute color, but stopped working after a few days.

reviews.title: Not the best
reviews.text: I wanted so much to love this mouse, sadly after a few months it began to fail. The scrolling feature only works randomly, most of the time when you click, you have to click twice for it to work. Used brand new batteries but it didn't make a difference. Disappointed that I wasted money, will stick with a name brand.

title: LZYDD Mouse Anti-Slip Tape Elastics Refined Side Grips Sweat Resistant Pads / Anti Sweat Paste for Logitech G Pro Wireless Mouse
description: Anti-Slip tape Elastics Refined Side Grips Sweat resistant pads / anti sweat paste for Logitech G pro wireless mouse
features: Come with 1 set including 4 parts ( 2 top parts and 2 side parts)
Only Anti-Slip tape included, No mouse included

reviews.title: Amazing addition to the Logitech G Pro Wireless!
reviews.text: Great quality, precision cut pieces that fit EXACTLY in the shape of the mouse. Whoever designed the CAD for this did a great job on the measurements. Using the grip itself, also crazy how something so small makes a big difference. No more worrying about it slipping off my right thumb which I mentally couldn't handle. It's shame that Logitech didn't design the grip but this will do nicely until they do.

reviews.title: They're ok.
reviews.text:
I'm only using the side grips. (No issue with the texture of the buttons, so imo, its best to just not use them and keep the mouse as light as possible)

Its definitely an improvement over the stock plastic feel, which is too smooth for me. These add some grip, and even a bit of cushion.

Guess I was expecting a more grippy feeling. Maybe a more pronounced texture. There is definitely room for improvement for those of us with sweaty gaming hands.

I also wish the edges were tapered off at its edges rather than a hard cut, but that's a minor nitpick and not too important.

I will say with these grips, I am having trouble deciding between which mouse to use primarily... G Pro Wireless or Viper Ultimate. This is definitely something that was missing from the G Pro Wireless's design for me.

reviews.title: Love it!
reviews.text: Was expecting more of a Dbrand style sticker, but this is even better. It's super rubbery and grippy. Don't ever plan on missing a shot when you play with this!

reviews.title: It works for G305
reviews.text: I recently purchased Logitech G305, But it felt slippery. Though this product was intended for GPW, it worked well for the G305.
